_comment: Reference outputs for Phase API ERD validation CI. Generated against schema/erd.schema.json (JSON Schema draft-07). Update intentionally when schema or example ERDs change. Companion artifact for: R. D. Javor, 'Electromagnetic Response Descriptors, Spatial Validity Regions, and the Phase API: An Antenna-Domain Interface for Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces in 6G', ZeroPilot Corporation, 2026.

expected.notes: 1-bit PIN-diode ERD. realized_phase_range [0, 180]; SVR core 45 deg, marginal 60 deg. per_state_insertion_loss_dB has 2 entries (one per binary state).
Continuous varactor ERD. realized_phase_range [0, 360]; phase_quantization_resolution 0.0; SVR core 50 deg, marginal 65 deg. per_state_insertion_loss_dB has 1 entry (continuous hardware).
